title: Contact Us — DIGI-METER
description: Get in touch with the DIGI-METER consortium — for pilot participation, research collaboration, media enquiries, or newsletter subscription.

strings.source: Get in Touch · Work With Us
strings.value: Get in Touch · Work With Us

strings.source: Questions about the project, interest in participating in pilots, media enquiries, or research collaboration? Reach the right team directly.
strings.value: Questions about the project, interest in participating in pilots, media enquiries, or research collaboration? Reach the right team directly.

strings.source: Whether you're a school looking to participate in our pilot, a researcher wanting to collaborate, a journalist covering digital education, or simply curious about the project — we're happy to hear from you.
strings.value: Whether you're a school looking to participate in our pilot, a researcher wanting to collaborate, a journalist covering digital education, or simply curious about the project — we're happy to hear from you.

strings.source: Receive periodic progress updates, deliverable alerts, and event announcements.
strings.value: Receive periodic progress updates, deliverable alerts, and event announcements.

strings.source: I agree to receive DIGI-METER updates under GDPR privacy policies. *
strings.value: I agree to receive DIGI-METER updates under GDPR privacy policies. *

strings.source: I agree that DIGI-METER partners may process my submitted data to respond to my query under GDPR regulations. *
strings.value: I agree that DIGI-METER partners may process my submitted data to respond to my query under GDPR regulations. *

strings.source: Can my school participate in the DIGI-METER pilot?
strings.value: Can my school participate in the DIGI-METER pilot?

strings.source: The project will pilot its tools with schools and VET providers across Europe. Participation details and timelines will be announced on this website and in the newsletter once confirmed by the consortium. To express your interest, contact us selecting "Pilot Schools" as your subject.
strings.value: The project will pilot its tools with schools and VET providers across Europe. Participation details and timelines will be announced on this website and in the newsletter once confirmed by the consortium. To express your interest, contact us selecting "Pilot Schools" as your subject.

strings.source: Is the platform free to use?
strings.value: Is the platform free to use?

strings.source: Access arrangements for the DIGI-METER platform will be announced by the consortium before launch. Details for pilot participants will be shared as part of the pilot onboarding information.
strings.value: Access arrangements for the DIGI-METER platform will be announced by the consortium before launch. Details for pilot participants will be shared as part of the pilot onboarding information.

strings.source: What data does the platform collect and how is it protected?
strings.value: What data does the platform collect and how is it protected?

strings.source: DIGI-METER follows an ethics-by-design approach, with attention to transparency, GDPR compliance, fairness, explainability, and user control. Detailed information about what the platform collects and how it is protected will be published in a dedicated privacy notice before the platform launches.
strings.value: DIGI-METER follows an ethics-by-design approach, with attention to transparency, GDPR compliance, fairness, explainability, and user control. Detailed information about what the platform collects and how it is protected will be published in a dedicated privacy notice before the platform launches.

strings.source: What languages will the platform support?
strings.value: What languages will the platform support?

strings.source: The list of supported languages is currently being finalised by the consortium and will be announced before the platform launches.
strings.value: The list of supported languages is currently being finalised by the consortium and will be announced before the platform launches.

strings.source: I'm a journalist. Where can I get press materials?
strings.value: I'm a journalist. Where can I get press materials?

strings.source: Press and media materials including the project factsheet, visual branding assets, and boilerplate text are available from Outside Media & Knowledge, our communication lead. For interview requests or specific media enquiries, please email
strings.value: Press and media materials including the project factsheet, visual branding assets, and boilerplate text are available from Outside Media & Knowledge, our communication lead. For interview requests or specific media enquiries, please email

strings.source: or use the form above with "Media" selected as the subject.
strings.value: or use the form above with "Media" selected as the subject.

strings.source: Can I use DIGI-METER resources in my own research?
strings.value: Can I use DIGI-METER resources in my own research?

strings.source: Public DIGI-METER outputs will be published as open-access materials, and the applicable licence will be stated on each resource when it is released. Please credit the DIGI-METER project and European Union funding when citing project materials. For formal research collaboration, contact us via the "Research" subject.
strings.value: Public DIGI-METER outputs will be published as open-access materials, and the applicable licence will be stated on each resource when it is released. Please credit the DIGI-METER project and European Union funding when citing project materials. For formal research collaboration, contact us via the "Research" subject.

strings.source: Need quotes, data, or an expert for a story about digital education, AI in schools, or DigComp 2.2? Get in touch with the project team and we will connect you with the right expert.
strings.value: Need quotes, data, or an expert for a story about digital education, AI in schools, or DigComp 2.2? Get in touch with the project team and we will connect you with the right expert.

strings.source: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems. An Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project.
strings.value: Measuring Digital Competence for Resilient Learning Ecosystems. An Erasmus+ Forward-Looking project.
